title: Welcome
summary: An opening note for the portfolio and blog.
author: Aidin Jalilzadeh
body:
# Welcome

This portfolio is organized around a simple academic structure: a concise home page, a video archive, and a blog for longer-form writing.

## Why this format

- It keeps public-facing work easy to navigate.
- It supports regular publishing without a custom backend.
- It stays compatible with GitHub Pages.

Future posts can be published from the admin panel and stored directly in the repository.
